title: Hugging Face Bias Risks And Limitations Module
description: Derived from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huggingface/huggingface_hub/refs/heads/main/src/huggingface_hub/templates/modelcard_template.md, headings '## Bias, Risks, and Limitations' and '### Recommendations'. This is a non-optional section in the original template.

bias_recommendations.description: Recommendations for safe or appropriate use.
bias_recommendations.default: Users (both direct and downstream) should be made aware of the risks, biases and limitations of the model. More information needed for further recommendations.
